code:
// 교육용 빅뱅 시뮬레이션 - 실시간 물리 시뮬레이션 기반 4단계 진화 과정
import*as THREE from"three";/**
 * 1️⃣ 쿼크-글루온 플라즈마 단계 (2초)
 * 50만 개의 입자가 급속으로 움직이고, 냉각 효과를 통해 속도 감소
 */export function createQuarkGluonPlasma(){let numParticles=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:500000;const group=new THREE.Group();// 50만 개의 고에너지 입자
const geometry=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const positions=new Float32Array(numParticles*3);const colors=new Float32Array(numParticles*3);const velocities=new Float32Array(numParticles*3);// 입자 타입: 0=업쿼크(빨강), 1=다운쿼크(초록), 2=스트레인지(파랑), 3=글루온(노랑)
const types=new Uint8Array(numParticles);for(let i=0;i<numParticles;i++){// 구 내에 균등 분포
const r=Math.random()*400;const theta=Math.random()*Math.PI*2;const phi=Math.random()*Math.PI;positions[i*3]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.cos(theta);positions[i*3+1]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.sin(theta);positions[i*3+2]=r*Math.cos(phi);// 랜덤 방향의 고속 속도 (실시간 시뮬레이션용)
const speed=3+Math.random()*7;// 빠른 움직임
const vTheta=Math.random()*Math.PI*2;const vPhi=Math.random()*Math.PI;velocities[i*3]=speed*Math.sin(vPhi)*Math.cos(vTheta);velocities[i*3+1]=speed*Math.sin(vPhi)*Math.sin(vTheta);velocities[i*3+2]=speed*Math.cos(vPhi);// 입자 타입 할당 및 색상
const type=Math.floor(Math.random()*4);types[i]=type;if(type===0){// 업 쿼크: 빨강
colors[i*3]=1.0;colors[i*3+1]=0.2;colors[i*3+2]=0.2;}else if(type===1){// 다운 쿼크: 초록
colors[i*3]=0.2;colors[i*3+1]=1.0;colors[i*3+2]=0.2;}else if(type===2){// 스트레인지 쿼크: 파랑
colors[i*3]=0.2;colors[i*3+1]=0.2;colors[i*3+2]=1.0;}else{// 글루온: 노랑
colors[i*3]=1.0;colors[i*3+1]=1.0;colors[i*3+2]=0.2;}}geometry.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(positions,3));geometry.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(colors,3));const material=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:1.2,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true,transparent:true,opacity:0.8});const points=new THREE.Points(geometry,material);points.userData.velocities=velocities;points.userData.types=types;points.userData.isPhysicsSimulation=true;group.add(points);return{group,velocities,positions};}/**
 * 2️⃣ 쿼크 결합 → 양성자/중성자 (2.5초)
 * 3개 쿼크가 점진적으로 모여드는 모습
 * 오렌지색 결합선이 강하게 결합됨을 표현
 * 진행도(%)에 따라 변화
 */export function createQuarkCombination(stageProgress){const group=new THREE.Group();// 100개의 하드론 형성 과정 (각각 3개 쿼크씩)
const numHadronGroups=100000;// 쿼크 위치 및 색상
const quarkGeometry=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const quarkPositions=new Float32Array(numHadronGroups*3*3);// 3쿼크 x 3좌표
const quarkColors=new Float32Array(numHadronGroups*3*3);// 형성된 하드론 (양성자/중성자)
const hadronGeometry=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const hadronPositions=new Float32Array(numHadronGroups*3);const hadronColors=new Float32Array(numHadronGroups*3);// 결합선 (쿼크 사이 강한 상호작용 표현)
const lineGeometry=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const linePositions=[];const lineColors=[];for(let i=0;i<numHadronGroups;i++){// 하드론의 중심 위치
const hadronX=(Math.random()-0.5)*1000;const hadronY=(Math.random()-0.5)*1000;const hadronZ=(Math.random()-0.5)*1000;hadronPositions[i*3]=hadronX;hadronPositions[i*3+1]=hadronY;hadronPositions[i*3+2]=hadronZ;// 하드론의 종류 (양성자 vs 중성자)
const isProton=Math.random()>0.5;if(isProton){hadronColors[i*3]=1.0;hadronColors[i*3+1]=0.1;hadronColors[i*3+2]=0.1;}else{hadronColors[i*3]=0.1;hadronColors[i*3+1]=0.1;hadronColors[i*3+2]=1.0;}// 3개의 쿼크가 모여드는 과정
const quarkPositionsThree=[];for(let q=0;q<3;q++){const angle=q/3*Math.PI*2;// 진행도에 따라 쿼크가 모여듦
const distance=(1-stageProgress)*120+stageProgress*10;const qx=hadronX+Math.cos(angle)*distance;const qy=hadronY+Math.sin(angle)*distance;const qz=hadronZ+(Math.random()-0.5)*distance;quarkPositions[(i*3+q)*3]=qx;quarkPositions[(i*3+q)*3+1]=qy;quarkPositions[(i*3+q)*3+2]=qz;quarkPositionsThree.push([qx,qy,qz]);// 쿼크 색상 (3가지 타입)
const quarkType=q;if(quarkType===0){quarkColors[(i*3+q)*3]=1.0;// 빨강
quarkColors[(i*3+q)*3+1]=0.2;quarkColors[(i*3+q)*3+2]=0.2;}else if(quarkType===1){quarkColors[(i*3+q)*3]=0.2;// 초록
quarkColors[(i*3+q)*3+1]=1.0;quarkColors[(i*3+q)*3+2]=0.2;}else{quarkColors[(i*3+q)*3]=0.2;// 파랑
quarkColors[(i*3+q)*3+1]=0.2;quarkColors[(i*3+q)*3+2]=1.0;}}// 3개 쿼크를 연결하는 오렌지 결합선
if(i%100===0){// 성능 최적화: 일부만 그리기
for(let q=0;q<3;q++){const nextQ=(q+1)%3;linePositions.push(quarkPositionsThree[q][0],quarkPositionsThree[q][1],quarkPositionsThree[q][2],quarkPositionsThree[nextQ][0],quarkPositionsThree[nextQ][1],quarkPositionsThree[nextQ][2]);const orangeIntensity=stageProgress;lineColors.push(1.0*orangeIntensity,0.5*orangeIntensity,0.0,1.0*orangeIntensity,0.5*orangeIntensity,0.0);}}}// 쿼크 렌더링
quarkGeometry.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(quarkPositions,3));quarkGeometry.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(quarkColors,3));const quarkMaterial=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:2+stageProgress,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true,transparent:true,opacity:1-stageProgress*0.3// 진행에 따라 투명해짐
});const quarkPoints=new THREE.Points(quarkGeometry,quarkMaterial);group.add(quarkPoints);// 결합선 렌더링
if(linePositions.length>0){lineGeometry.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(new Float32Array(linePositions),3));lineGeometry.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(new Float32Array(lineColors),3));const lineMaterial=new THREE.LineBasicMaterial({vertexColors:true,transparent:true,opacity:0.3+stageProgress*0.5,linewidth:2});const lines=new THREE.LineSegments(lineGeometry,lineMaterial);group.add(lines);}// 형성된 하드론 렌더링
hadronGeometry.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(hadronPositions,3));hadronGeometry.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(hadronColors,3));const hadronMaterial=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:4+stageProgress*2,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true,transparent:true,opacity:stageProgress*0.9// 진행에 따라 나타남
});const hadronPoints=new THREE.Points(hadronGeometry,hadronMaterial);group.add(hadronPoints);return group;}/**
 * 3️⃣ 핵융합 → 원자핵 형성 (2.5초)
 * 양성자와 중성자가 융합되는 과정
 * 초반: 분리된 입자 → 후반: 헬륨/리튬/베릴륨 핵
 */export function createNucleosynthesis(stageProgress){const group=new THREE.Group();const numNuclei=100000;// 개별 양성자/중성자 (융합 전)
const pnGeometry=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const pnPositions=new Float32Array(numNuclei*2*3);// 양성자 + 중성자
const pnColors=new Float32Array(numNuclei*2*3);// 형성된 핵들 (융합 후)
const nucleusGeometry=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const nucleusPositions=new Float32Array(numNuclei*3);const nucleusColors=new Float32Array(numNuclei*3);for(let i=0;i<numNuclei;i++){// 융합될 핵의 중심
const nucleusX=(Math.random()-0.5)*900;const nucleusY=(Math.random()-0.5)*900;const nucleusZ=(Math.random()-0.5)*900;nucleusPositions[i*3]=nucleusX;nucleusPositions[i*3+1]=nucleusY;nucleusPositions[i*3+2]=nucleusZ;// 형성된 핵의 종류 (He-4, Li, Be)
const nucleusType=i%3;if(nucleusType===0){// 헬륨-4: 시안색
nucleusColors[i*3]=0.2+stageProgress*0.3;nucleusColors[i*3+1]=0.8+stageProgress*0.2;nucleusColors[i*3+2]=1.0;}else if(nucleusType===1){// 리튬: 초록색
nucleusColors[i*3]=0.2;nucleusColors[i*3+1]=1.0;nucleusColors[i*3+2]=0.2;}else{// 베릴륨: 노란색
nucleusColors[i*3]=1.0;nucleusColors[i*3+1]=0.9;nucleusColors[i*3+2]=0.2;}// 양성자 (빨강) - 진행에 따라 가까워짐
const protonDistance=(1-stageProgress)*100+stageProgress*15;const protonAngle=Math.random()*Math.PI*2;pnPositions[i*2*3]=nucleusX+Math.cos(protonAngle)*protonDistance;pnPositions[i*2*3+1]=nucleusY+Math.sin(protonAngle)*protonDistance;pnPositions[i*2*3+2]=nucleusZ+(Math.random()-0.5)*protonDistance;pnColors[i*2*3]=1.0;pnColors[i*2*3+1]=0.1;pnColors[i*2*3+2]=0.1;// 중성자 (파랑) - 반대편에서 접근
const neutronDistance=(1-stageProgress)*100+stageProgress*15;const neutronAngle=protonAngle+Math.PI+Math.random()*0.3;pnPositions[i*2*3+3]=nucleusX+Math.cos(neutronAngle)*neutronDistance;pnPositions[i*2*3+4]=nucleusY+Math.sin(neutronAngle)*neutronDistance;pnPositions[i*2*3+5]=nucleusZ+(Math.random()-0.5)*neutronDistance;pnColors[i*2*3+3]=0.1;pnColors[i*2*3+4]=0.1;pnColors[i*2*3+5]=1.0;}// 개별 양성자/중성자 렌더링
pnGeometry.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(pnPositions,3));pnGeometry.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(pnColors,3));const pnMaterial=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:3+(1-stageProgress)*1.5,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true,transparent:true,opacity:(1-stageProgress)*0.8// 진행에 따라 사라짐
});const pnPoints=new THREE.Points(pnGeometry,pnMaterial);group.add(pnPoints);// 형성된 핵 렌더링
nucleusGeometry.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(nucleusPositions,3));nucleusGeometry.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(nucleusColors,3));const nucleusMaterial=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:6+stageProgress*3,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true,transparent:true,opacity:stageProgress*0.9// 진행에 따라 나타남
});const nucleusPoints=new THREE.Points(nucleusGeometry,nucleusMaterial);group.add(nucleusPoints);return group;}/**
 * 4️⃣ 원자 형성 (3초)
 * 전자들이 궤도를 따라 이동 (Bohr 모델)
 * 초반: 전자가 핵 근처 → 후반: 완성된 궤도
 */export function createAtomFormation(stageProgress){const group=new THREE.Group();const numAtoms=80000;const atomCenters=[];// 각 원자의 핵 위치 결정
for(let i=0;i<numAtoms;i++){atomCenters.push({x:(Math.random()-0.5)*1200,y:(Math.random()-0.5)*1200,z:(Math.random()-0.5)*1200,isHydrogen:Math.random()>0.3// 70% 수소, 30% 헬륨
});}// 핵 렌더링
const nucleusGeometry=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const nucleusPositions=new Float32Array(numAtoms*3);const nucleusColors=new Float32Array(numAtoms*3);for(let i=0;i<numAtoms;i++){nucleusPositions[i*3]=atomCenters[i].x;nucleusPositions[i*3+1]=atomCenters[i].y;nucleusPositions[i*3+2]=atomCenters[i].z;// 핵: 노란색
nucleusColors[i*3]=1.0;nucleusColors[i*3+1]=0.8;nucleusColors[i*3+2]=0.1;}nucleusGeometry.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(nucleusPositions,3));nucleusGeometry.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(nucleusColors,3));const nucleusMaterial=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:5+stageProgress*2,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true});const nucleusPoints=new THREE.Points(nucleusGeometry,nucleusMaterial);group.add(nucleusPoints);// 궤도 렌더링 (선으로 표현)
const orbitLineGeometry=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const orbitLinePositions=[];// 궤도 선 그리기 (일부만)
for(let i=0;i<Math.min(numAtoms,1000);i++){const center=atomCenters[i];const orbitRadius=80+(center.isHydrogen?0:50);const segments=32;for(let s=0;s<segments;s++){const angle1=s/segments*Math.PI*2;const angle2=(s+1)/segments*Math.PI*2;const x1=center.x+Math.cos(angle1)*orbitRadius*stageProgress;const y1=center.y+Math.sin(angle1)*orbitRadius*stageProgress;const z1=center.z;const x2=center.x+Math.cos(angle2)*orbitRadius*stageProgress;const y2=center.y+Math.sin(angle2)*orbitRadius*stageProgress;const z2=center.z;orbitLinePositions.push(x1,y1,z1,x2,y2,z2);}}if(orbitLinePositions.length>0){orbitLineGeometry.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(new Float32Array(orbitLinePositions),3));const orbitLineMaterial=new THREE.LineBasicMaterial({color:0x5088ff,transparent:true,opacity:0.3*stageProgress,linewidth:1});const orbitLines=new THREE.LineSegments(orbitLineGeometry,orbitLineMaterial);group.add(orbitLines);}// 전자 렌더링 (궤도를 따라 이동)
const electronGeometry=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const totalElectrons=Math.floor(numAtoms*1.3);const electronPositions=new Float32Array(totalElectrons*3);const electronColors=new Float32Array(totalElectrons*3);let electronIdx=0;const currentTime=Date.now()*0.001;// 시간 (초 단위)
for(let i=0;i<numAtoms;i++){const center=atomCenters[i];const numElectrons=center.isHydrogen?1:2;const orbitRadius=80+(center.isHydrogen?0:50);for(let e=0;e<numElectrons&&electronIdx<totalElectrons;e++){// 궤도 상의 위치
const baseAngle=e/numElectrons*Math.PI*2;const orbitalPlaneAngle=e*0.5*Math.PI;// 다른 궤도 평면
// 시간 기반 애니메이션 (궤도 회전)
const time=currentTime*(e+1)*0.5;const angle=baseAngle+time;// 3D 궤도 좌표 (회전하는 타원)
const x=Math.cos(angle)*Math.cos(orbitalPlaneAngle)*orbitRadius*stageProgress;const y=Math.sin(angle)*orbitRadius*stageProgress;const z=Math.cos(angle)*Math.sin(orbitalPlaneAngle)*orbitRadius*stageProgress;electronPositions[electronIdx*3]=center.x+x;electronPositions[electronIdx*3+1]=center.y+y;electronPositions[electronIdx*3+2]=center.z+z;// 전자: 청록색
electronColors[electronIdx*3]=0.2+stageProgress*0.5;electronColors[electronIdx*3+1]=0.9+stageProgress*0.1;electronColors[electronIdx*3+2]=1.0;electronIdx++;}}electronGeometry.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(electronPositions,3));electronGeometry.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(electronColors,3));const electronMaterial=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:2.5+stageProgress*1.5,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true,transparent:true,opacity:0.2+stageProgress*0.6// 진행에 따라 명확해짐
});const electronPoints=new THREE.Points(electronGeometry,electronMaterial);// 매 프레임 업데이트를 위한 플래그
electronPoints.userData.isAnimated=true;electronPoints.userData.atomCenters=atomCenters;group.add(electronPoints);return group;}/**
 * 빅뱅 교육용 단계 정보
 */export const educationalBigBangStages=[{id:0,name:"쿼크-글루온 플라즈마",timeRange:"10⁻¹² 초 (1 피코초)",koreanTime:"우주 1조분의 1초",description:"우주가 극도로 뜨거워 쿼크와 글루온이 자유롭게 움직이고 있습니다. 이들은 아직 결합되지 않은 상태입니다.",color:0xff6b6b,duration:2000},{id:1,name:"쿼크 결합 → 양성자/중성자",timeRange:"10⁻⁶ 초 (1 마이크로초)",koreanTime:"우주 100만분의 1초",description:"온도가 낮아지면서 쿼크 3개가 결합하여 양성자와 중성자가 형성됩니다. 강한 핵력에 의해 결합됩니다.",color:0x4ecdc4,duration:2500},{id:2,name:"핵융합 → 원자핵 형성",timeRange:"1-3 분",koreanTime:"우주 처음 3분",description:"양성자와 중성자가 결합하여 헬륨-4, 리튬 등 가벼운 원소의 핵이 형성됩니다. 이를 빅뱅 핵합성이라고 합니다.",color:0x95e77d,duration:2500},{id:3,name:"원자 형성",timeRange:"38만 년",koreanTime:"우주 38만 년",description:"우주가 충분히 식으면서 전자가 핵 주위를 돌기 시작합니다. 중성 원자(수소, 헬륨)가 형성되고 우주가 투명해집니다.",color:0xb0a0ff,duration:3000}];export function getEducationalStageInfo(stageId){return educationalBigBangStages[stageId];}export function getTotalEducationalBigBangDuration(){return educationalBigBangStages.reduce((sum,stage)=>sum+stage.duration,0);}
